SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN ALONSO MULATO GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CRISTIAN ALONSO MULATO $920.97 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
